description_long: This is a single slip-on shoe with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a textured pink upper that appears to be made from a breathable knit or mesh material. The upper is seamless, with no visible laces or fasteners, and has a low-cut heel section with small raised triangular details for added grip or style. The sole is thick, white, and slightly contoured, likely made from lightweight foam or rubber, providing cushioning and support. The interior is hollow, designed to comfortably fit a human foot, and the opening is wide for easy slip-on access. The overall appearance is clean and new, with no visible branding or logos.
description: A pink slip-on shoe with a textured knit upper and a thick white sole, designed for comfort and easy wear. The shoe is seamless, modern, and appears new.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe and seamless pink knit upper, with the white sole visible at the base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the textured knit pattern, the low-cut heel, and the thick white sole.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the open heel area and the hollow interior, with the sole's thickness and heel cutout visible.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the same knit texture and sole as the left, with the heel's triangular details more visible.
